sqlCommand.descr: update SAP_ledger_data_temp set trade_ptr = substring(trade_ptr,3,4) where Flex3 = '[batchID]' and substring(trade_ptr,1,2) = '00'
delete from SAP_ledger_data_temp where Flex3 = '[batchID]' and Flex2 in ('D','V','Z')

insert into SAP_ledger_data_temp (co,fiscal_year,gl,doc_no,item_no,post_key,doc_amt,lc_amt,lc2_amt,ref1,ref2,ref3,assignment,txt,profit_centre,cost_centre,bus_cat,trans_type,uwyr,broker,trade_ptr,ptf,contract,prod_code,vendor,tax_code,period,ledger,posting_date,entry_date,doc_user,doc_type,doc_hdr_text,crcy,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,gl_crcy,gl_doc_amt) (select x1.co,x1.fiscal_year,x1.gl,x1.doc_no,x1.item_no,x1.post_key,x1.doc_amt,x1.lc_amt,x1.lc2_amt,x1.ref1,x1.ref2,x1.ref3,x1.assignment,x1.txt,x1.profit_centre,x1.cost_centre,x1.bus_cat,x1.trans_type,x2.uwyr,x2.broker,x2.trade_ptr,x2.ptf,x2.contract,x2.prod_code,x2.vendor,x2.tax_code,x3.period,x3.ledger,x3.posting_date,x3.entry_date,x3.doc_user,x3.doc_type,x3.doc_hdr_text,x3.crcy,'[batchID]' as Flex1,x2.Flex1 as Flex2,x1.Flex2 as Flex3,x2.gl_crcy,x2.gl_doc_amt from SAP_ledger_data_temp x1 inner join SAP_ledger_data_temp x2 on x1.flex3 = x2.flex3 and x1.co = x2.co and x1.doc_no = x2.doc_no and x1.item_no = x2.item_no and not x1.gl is null and not x2.flex1 is null inner join SAP_ledger_data_temp x3 on x1.flex3 = x3.flex3 and x1.co = x3.co and x1.doc_no = x3.doc_no and not x1.gl is null and not x3.doc_type is null where x1.flex3 = '[batchID]')
delete from SAP_ledger_data_temp where fiscal_year = [Yr] and not coalesce(flex1,'') = '[batchID]'
update SAP_ledger_data_temp set doc_amt = -doc_amt, lc_amt = -lc_amt, lc2_amt = -lc2_amt, gl_doc_amt = -gl_doc_amt where Flex1 = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = 'H'
update SAP_ledger_data_temp set uwyr = '' where Flex1 = '[batchID]' and uwyr = '0'
update SAP_ledger_data_temp set vendor = '' where Flex1 = '[batchID]' and coalesce(vendor,'NULL')='NULL'

insert into SAP_ledger_data_temp (co,fiscal_year,gl,doc_no,item_no,post_key,doc_amt,lc_amt,lc2_amt,ref1,ref2,ref3,assignment,txt,profit_centre,cost_centre,bus_cat,trans_type,uwyr,broker,trade_ptr,ptf,contract,prod_code,vendor,tax_code,period,ledger,posting_date,entry_date,doc_user,doc_type,doc_hdr_text,crcy,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,gl_crcy,gl_doc_amt) (select co,fiscal_year,gl,doc_no,item_no + 1000 as item_no,post_key, -doc_amt,-lc_amt,-lc2_amt, ref1,ref2,ref3,assignment,txt,profit_centre,cost_centre,bus_cat,trans_type,uwyr,broker,trade_ptr,ptf,contract,prod_code,vendor,tax_code,period,ledger,posting_date,entry_date,doc_user,doc_type,doc_hdr_text,crcy,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,gl_crcy,gl_doc_amt from SAP_ledger_data_temp where flex1 = '[batchID]' and (crcy <> gl_crcy or doc_amt <> gl_doc_amt))

insert into SAP_ledger_data_temp (co,fiscal_year,gl,doc_no,item_no,post_key,doc_amt,lc_amt,lc2_amt,ref1,ref2,ref3,assignment,txt,profit_centre,cost_centre,bus_cat,trans_type,uwyr,broker,trade_ptr,ptf,contract,prod_code,vendor,tax_code,period,ledger,posting_date,entry_date,doc_user,doc_type,doc_hdr_text,crcy,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,gl_crcy,gl_doc_amt) (select co,fiscal_year,gl,doc_no,item_no + 2000 as item_no,post_key, gl_doc_amt as doc_amt,lc_amt,lc2_amt, ref1,ref2,ref3,assignment,txt,profit_centre,cost_centre,bus_cat,trans_type,uwyr,broker,trade_ptr,ptf,contract,prod_code,vendor,tax_code,period,ledger,posting_date,entry_date,doc_user,doc_type,doc_hdr_text, gl_crcy as crcy,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,gl_crcy,gl_doc_amt from SAP_ledger_data_temp where flex1 = '[batchID]' and (crcy <> gl_crcy or doc_amt <> gl_doc_amt) and item_no < 1000)
insert into SAP_ledger_data select * from SAP_ledger_data_temp where flex1 = '[batchID]'
